game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Two Dots is a minimalist puzzle game where players connect two or more adjacent dots of the same color, either horizontally or vertically, to clear them from a grid-based board. Forming a square with four matching dots clears all dots of that color from the entire board, introducing a key strategic element. Each of the thousands of levels presents unique objectives, such as clearing specific dot quantities or dropping special items, all within a limited number of moves, with failure costing a life. Progression involves advancing through a vast world map, encountering new obstacles and mechanics, alongside diverse game modes like Scavenger Hunts and Treasure Hunts offering varied challenges and collectible trophies. Controls are intuitive, requiring a simple tap and drag to draw lines between matching dots. Monetization includes optional in-app purchases for power-ups like extra moves or shuffles, and lives, with random item purchases also available.
game_info.description: Connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them from the grid! Draw lines horizontally or vertically between matching dots. Create a square with four dots of the same color to trigger a powerful explosion that clears ALL dots of that color. Complete level objectives within the move limit to progress. Each level has unique goals like clearing specific dot counts or reaching target scores.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections
WASD Keys: Alternative navigation (not used in gameplay)
Space: Select/confirm menu option
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to start screen from game over
